title: Fixture Paper Abstract Section
body: Abstract fixture: the paper studies inference serving tradeoffs between context length, first-token latency, and aggregate throughput.

title: Fixture Paper Method Section
body: Method fixture: long prompts increase prefill work and can raise TTFT under concurrent serving, while decode behavior is reflected by TPOT.

title: Fixture Paper Limitations Section
body: Limitations fixture: conclusions are limited by small model size, synthetic workloads, and incomplete evidence for generalized routing decisions.
